items.summary: Update `frontend/src/pages/DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx` so that each of the 10 table cards (Users, Doctors, Specialties, Doctor_Schedules, Appointments, Payments, Reviews, Medical_Records, Corporate_Accounts, Subscriptions) displays the following hardcoded content in order: (1) Table Name as a bold heading, (2) a one-line plain-English description of the table's purpose, (3) a field list where each row shows 'Column Name – Data Type', (4) the Primary Key field clearly labelled (e.g., with a 'PK' badge or inline label), and (5) any Foreign Key fields clearly labelled with a 'FK' badge or inline label indicating the referenced table. All content must remain hardcoded JSX — no .map(), no useState, no useEffect, no hooks, no external library imports beyond React and Tailwind CSS classes. The component must remain a single self-contained default-export functional component with no props, no routing logic, no backend calls, and no animations. Styling must follow the existing Medical Blue theme using Tailwind utility classes consistent with the rest of the application.
